subject: [PATCH v6 1/2] mm: bypass mmap_miss heuristic for VM_EXEC readahead

2026-05-29.patch_summary: This patch modifies the Linux kernel's memory management to bypass the mmap_miss heuristic for VM_EXEC readahead mappings. The mmap_miss heuristic is intended to prevent speculative mmap readahead when a file appears to be randomly accessed, but this does not fit well with the VM_EXEC path. The patch changes the behavior of do_async_mmap_readahead and filemap_map_pages to skip both increments and decrements of the mmap_miss counter for VM_EXEC mappings, matching the existing treatment for VM_SEQ_READ mappings. This ensures that the counter remains symmetric and accurate for executable mappings.
